text: Artificial intelligence is becoming more common in our daily lives, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major issue is bias. If AI systems are trained on data that reflects unfair human prejudices, they can make biased decisions, for example in hiring or loan applications. This means fairness must be a priority when designing these technologies. Another concern is privacy, as AI often collects and analyzes large amounts of personal information. Companies need to be transparent about how data is used and how decisions are made. Ultimately, responsible AI development requires careful thought to avoid harm and ensure technology helps everyone equally.
